topic: The Metaphysics of Flux — Unified Framework for Perpetual Transformation (Omni-Performative Engine)
content_preview: Five-domain theoretical synthesis (physics, philosophy, Buddhist/Indigenous cosmology, systems theory, performance practice) establishing transformation and relationality as fundamental nature of reality. Provides conceptual vocabulary, design principles, and multi-audience framings for the Omni-Performative Engine. Converges on five principles: process primacy, constitutive relationality, circular causality, edge-of-chaos creativity, identity through difference.
